name: Copy Lattice Value
description: Server-side value duplication: reads from any resolvable path (from) and writes the value to a writable path (to). Common idiom: pin a venue op into your own namespace as a callable name — covia_copy from=v/ops/json/merge to=o/merge, then grid_run operation=o/merge. Also useful for snapshotting remote data locally or branching workspace values. Both read and write capability checks apply. Returns {copied: true}.

from.description: Source path. Any resolvable address: hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path (w/, g/, j/, etc.).

to.description: Destination path. Must be writable: w/, o/, n/, or t/.

copied.description: True if the value was successfully copied.
